subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which historical site is associated with the establishment of Jaipur as the capital city?
question_hi: जयपुर को राजधानी को संरक्षण के लिए कौन सा हितवर्जित स्थान है?
explanation_en:
The cenotaphs of the Royal Family, also known as Chintamani, are related to the establishment of Jaipur as the capital city.
